subcodes.first_line: The Day is come, and the people remain veiled in manifest obscurity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الیوم و القوم فی حجاب مبین قد ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @proclamation to the people of the world, @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God
